SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbendException
Exception thrown to indicate an abnormal end (abend) condition in the application.
AbstractCobolFile
 
AbstractDefineSubcommand
 
AbstractEntrySequentialFile
 
AbstractFile
Abstract file class providing base methods for all N.I.B. supported file types
AbstractIOClass
 
AbstractJobEditCommand
 
AbstractKeySequentialFile
 
AbstractKeySequentialFile.Key
 
AbstractNDecimal
AbstractNDecimal is an abstract class designed to handle numeric values with a specified number of significant digits and adjustable decimal precision.
AbstractNElementary
AbstractNElementary represents an abstract definition for an elementary field within a memory structure.
AbstractNField
Represents an abstract class for managing and manipulating memory fields.
AbstractNField.Justified
 
AbstractNFloatingPoint
AbstractNFloatingPoint is an abstract class representing a floating-point numeric data type.
AbstractNNumeric
Represents an abstract representation of a numeric field.
AbstractNSqlCommand
This abstract class represents a SQL command.
AbstractOnlineProgram
 
AbstractOnlineProgram.ISectionDelegate
 
AbstractProgram
NIB Abstract program Every program running as a such (so CALLed, CANCELed, etc.) in the NIB framework must extend this class
AbstractProgram.ISectionDelegate
functional interface for SECTION delegates
AbstractRecordRelativeFile
 
AbstractRedisService
 
AbstractResponse
This is an abstract class named AbstractResponse.
AbstractSqlApi
 
AbstractVsamFile
 
AdminException
 
AdminMessage
 
AdminMessage
 
AdminMessage.Command
 
AdminMessage.Command
 
Advancing
 
AESUtil
 
AlterClassRequest
 
AlterJobRequest
 
ApiController
 
AtomikosWorkAroundAutoConfiguration
This mimics AtomikosAutoConfiguration which fixed spring boot 3.4 compatibility
BatchContext
 
BigDecimalValue
The BigDecimalValue class encapsulates a BigDecimal value and provides utility methods for interacting with it.
ByteTools
 
CacheManager
 
CacheMode
 
Catalog
Manages catalog entries.
CatalogApiBuilder
 
CatalogCommand
 
CatalogEntryCustomizer
 
CatalogEntryNotFoundException
Exception indicating that a catalog entry was not found.
CatalogEntryType
 
CatalogException
Exception indicating a generic error on catalog access

Channel
This class represents a Channel.

CharsetTools

ClusterStatus

CobolIndexedFile
Represents a COBOL indexed file.
CobolLineSequentialFile
Represents a COBOL line sequential file.
CobolRelativeFile
Represents a COBOL relative file.
CobolRuntimeBuilder
 
CobolSequentialFile
Represents a COBOL sequential file.
CommandResponse
This class represents a command response.
Condition
 
Condition.Operators
 
Config
 
Configuration
 
Configuration.DatasetsConfig
Datasets general configuration defaults
Configuration.ScriptingConfig
Scripting general configuration defaults
Configuration.SpoolConfig
Spool general configuration defaults
Configuration.UtilitiesConfig
Utilities configuration defaults
Configuration.VsamConfig
Database connection defaults
ConsoleSysio
Console bases SYSIN, SYSOUT and SYSLOG implementation
ConsoleSysout
Utility class for redirecting console output to a file or logging framework.
ConsoleSysout.Builder
Builder class for constructing ConsoleSysout instances with custom settings.
Context
 
Context.IProcedureDelegate
 
ContextException
Exception thrown to indicate an error related to program context.
Conversion
 
CopyCommand
 
DatabaseConnection
DatabaseConnection represents a JDBC connection to a relational database.
DatabaseFamily
DatabaseFamily represents the type of database.

DataSourceConfig

This class provides an empty implementation of Db2OnlineUtilitiesParserListener, which can be extended to create a listener which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.

This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by Db2OnlineUtilitiesParser.

NSqlCommand class extends AbstractNSqlCommand and provides methods to prepare and execute SQL commands.

NSqlCursor class extends NSqlCommand and provides methods to open, fetch, and close a cursor.
NSqlException
NSqlException class extends Exception and provides a custom exception for SQL errors.

NUInt32
 
NVarcharField
 
NZoned
 
ObservationsConfig

OEM
 
OpenMode
 
OracleSqlApi
 
PackageInfo

PersistentFlag
 
PgSqlApi
 
PointersRepository
 
Proc
 
ProceduralFlowManager
Experimental COBOL like procedural flow manager
ProceduralFlowManager.ProcessDelegate
Delegate functional interface
ProductLicense
 
ProgramInit
Indicates that the annotated method is intended to be called during program initialization.
ProgramLanguage
 
ProgramNotFoundException
An exception indicating that a program was not found.
ProgramStorage
Indicates that the annotated field is intended to be used for program working storage, and therefore automatically allocated when the program is created and cancelled at CANCEL.
ProgramUtils
 
Rba
Represents a Relative Buffer Address (RBA), which is a long value used to denote the position of a record within a file relative to the start of the file's buffer.
RdbmsLongTermStorage
 
Record
Represents a record with a specified maximum length and associated memory.
RecordAlreadyAllocatedException
 
RecordFormat
Enum representing various record formats.
RecordRelativeFile
 
RecordTooShortOrTooLongException
 
RedisCluster
 
RedisConfig
 
RedisLongTermStorage
 
RedisResourceLock
 
RedisSharedResources
 
RedissonAutoConfigurationCustomizer
 
RefBoolean
 
RefInteger
 
RefString
 
Region
 
RegionStartMode
 
RegionStatus
 
ReloadableClassLoader
 
RequiresNib
Indicates that the annotated program requires a specific version of N.I.B. library.
ResourceLockException
 
RestartData
 
RestartException
 
RestClient
 
RestException
 
Rrn
Represents a Relative Record Number (RRN), which is a long value used to denote the position of a record within a file relative to the start of the file.
RuntimeConfiguration
This class represents the runtime configuration for the application.
ScriptExecutionException
 
SecurityConfig
 
SecurityMode
 
SequentialFile
Represents a sequential file with various I/O operations.
Settable
 
SharedResourceNames
 
SharedResources
 
Slf4jSysout
Implementation of both ISysOut and ISysLog interfaces using a Logger.
SpecialRegister
 
SpecialValues
 
Sqlca
Sqlca class extends NGroup and provides a structure for SQL communication area.
SqlCondition
SqlCondition is an enum that provides the possible conditions for SQL errors.
SqlConditionException
SqlConditionException class extends ContextException and provides a custom exception for SQL conditions.
SqlError
SqlError class provides a structure for SQL errors.
SqlWarningException
 
StandaloneJobContext
 
StatusException
 
Step
 
Step.StepStatus
 
StopRunException
An exception indicating that the execution of a program should be stopped.
StorageConfig
 
StringTools
 
StringUtils
 
StringValue
 
SubmitException
 
SubmitRequest
 
SubmitResponse
 
SupernautBootApp
 
SupernautConfig
 
SupernautContext
 
SupernautContextBuilder
 
SupernautRegion
 
SwaggerConfig
 
Sysout
 
SysoutHandler
An implementation of the IsCOBOL OutddHandler interface that writes messages to the system out stream.
TableAlreadyExistsException
Exception indicating that the corresponding already exists
TableNotFoundException
Exception indicating that the corresponding table was not found.
Task
 
Task.TaskStatus
 
Terminal
 
TimerThread
 
Tn3270App
 
Tn3270Banner
 
Tn3270Connector
 
Tn3270Handler
 
Tn3270Server
 
Tn3270ThreadedHandler
 
TransactionDump
 
TransactionManagerDelegate
 
Unstring
 
Unstring.Delimited
 
Unstring.UnstringInto
 
UserAbendException
An exception indicating a user ABEND (abnormal end) during program execution.
VariableFormatType
Enumeration representing different variable format types.
Version
 
VersionsMismatchException
An exception indicating a mismatch between program and N.I.B. runtime versions.
VsamApiBuilder
Factory class for creating instances of IVsamApi and ICatalogApi based on the provided AbstractFile and DatabaseConnection.
VsamEmptyException
Exception indicating that the corresponding table was not found.
VsamOrganization
Enumeration representing different VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) organizations.
WebConfig
 
WebConfig
 
WebSecurityConfig
 
WebSecurityConfig.CustomMode
 
ZonedEditedFormatter
